sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Regions Earnings: Loan Portfolio Optimization Still in Progress
feed.summary: Regions Financial reported slightly disappointing first-quarter results with a sequential decline in net interest income, but maintained its full-year outlook. Morningstar plans to increase its fair value estimate for Regions stock due to a higher leverage ratio forecast stemming from new bank regulations, assessing shares as undervalued. The bank's granular deposit base and primary bank relationships in rural markets provide sticky retail deposits despite intense competition in other areas.

feed.title: Sysco Corp. (SYY) Raises Quarterly Dividend 1.9% to $0.55; 2.9% Yield
feed.summary: Sysco Corp. (NYSE: SYY) has announced a 1.9% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.55 per share, up from $0.54. This results in an annualized dividend of $2.2 and an annual yield of 2.9 percent. The dividend is payable on July 24, 2026, to stockholders of record on July 2, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of July 1, 2026.

feed.title: Sysco lifts dividend again, paying shareholders $0.55 in July
feed.summary: Sysco (NYSE:SYY) has announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.55 per share, up $0.01 from the previous $0.54. This dividend is payable on July 24, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 2, 2026. The company stated that this action reinforces its Dividend Aristocrat status and includes plans for a $0.04 annual dividend increase for fiscal year 2027.

feed.title: Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE:OBK) Sees Large Growth in Short Interest
feed.summary: Origin Bancorp (NYSE: OBK) experienced a 32.2% increase in short interest in March, reaching 570,732 shares, which represents about 1.9% of outstanding shares and a 3.1 days-to-cover ratio. The stock is currently trading near a 12-month high with a market cap of $1.42 billion, a P/E of 19.12, and recently beat earnings estimates. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating with a $46.67 consensus price target, and institutional investors have been increasing their holdings.

feed.title: Origin Bancorp (NYSE:OBK) Hits New 52-Week High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Origin Bancorp (NYSE:OBK) recently hit a new 52-week high of $46.59, with analysts giving it a "Moderate Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $46.67. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with an EPS of $0.95, and maintains a low debt-to-equity ratio and a 1.3% dividend yield. Institutional ownership is significant, with several hedge funds increasing their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp. (MPC) stock fell 5.55% on Friday, closing at $213.69 despite a positive day for the broader market, which saw the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average rise. The company's stock closed 16.45% below its 52-week high of $255.77, reached on March 30th. This performance indicates that Marathon Petroleum Corp. underperformed its competitors during the trading session.

feed.title: Analog Devices Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) saw its stock rally by 4.99% to $371.45 on Friday, outperforming the broader market. This marked the stock's second consecutive day of gains, occurring on a strong trading day where the S&P 500 Index rose 1.20% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 1.79%.

feed.title: Qualcomm warns a $150 share offer can leave investors below market
feed.summary: Qualcomm has advised its stockholders to reject an unsolicited "mini-tender" offer from Tutanota LLC to purchase shares at $150.00 each. The company warns that the offer price is likely below market value due to specific conditions, and Tutanota is not associated with Qualcomm. Qualcomm emphasized that mini-tender offers lack the usual investor protections afforded by larger tender offers and advises investors to carefully scrutinize such proposals.

feed.title: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE:PEO) Announces Dividend Increase - $0.52 Per Share
feed.summary: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE:PEO) has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.52 per share, up 6.1% from its previous $0.49. Shareholders of record on April 27th will receive the dividend on May 27th, representing an 8.1% yield. The stock traded down on Friday to $25.66, and institutional investors have recently adjusted their holdings in the fund.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK) details director roles and shareholder vote outcomes
feed.summary: BNY Mellon filed an amended 8-K report detailing updates to its board and the outcomes of its annual shareholder meeting held on April 14, 2026. The report specifies that Charles F. Lowrey was appointed to the Risk Committee and the Corporate Governance, Nominating and Social Responsibility Committee. Shareholders also re-elected 11 directors, approved the 2025 executive compensation in an advisory vote with 55.56% support, and ratified KPMG LLP as auditors with 98.11% support.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Booking Holdings (BKNG) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Booking Holdings (BKNG) after recent share price weakness, concluding that the stock appears undervalued according to both Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) analyses. The DCF model suggests a 38.2% discount, while its current P/E of 27.0x is below Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 36.8x. The authors also introduce "Narratives" as a way for investors to connect their views to financial forecasts and implied fair values for a more personalized valuation.

feed.title: Assessing West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) has seen recent positive share price momentum despite a year-to-date decline. Analysts suggest the stock is undervalued with a fair value estimate of $338.57, driven by growth opportunities in GLP-1s and higher-margin components. However, its current P/E ratio of 39.4x is significantly higher than both its fair ratio and peer averages, indicating potential valuation risk if earnings expectations cool.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials stock (US5732841060): Is infrastructure demand strong enough to drive sustained gains?
feed.summary: This report analyzes Martin Marietta Materials (US5732841060), a leading U.S. aggregates producer, assessing if strong infrastructure demand and AI buildout can drive sustained stock performance. It breaks down the company's business model, competitive position, market drivers, and risks, highlighting its role in foundational economies and its appeal to investors seeking exposure to resilient, essential industries.

feed.title: Is Verisk (VRSK) Quietly Deepening Its Claims Data Moat With New Roofr and Pilotbird Integrations?
feed.summary: Verisk (VRSK) is strengthening its position in the insurance claims data market through new integrations with Roofr and Pilotbird. These partnerships aim to streamline property and casualty claims by automating roof measurements and embedding social media investigations directly into Verisk's platforms. This move enhances Verisk's core offerings and increases reliance on its services, which could positively impact its long-term investment narrative despite concerns about debt and industry spending cycles.

feed.title: Army pushes industry to share costs as GE seeks more funding for ITEP testing
feed.summary: The Army is advocating for companies to share the costs of testing and development for defense programs, particularly in light of General Electric Aerospace's request for additional funding to complete qualification testing for the Improved Turbine Engine Program (ITEP). Maj. Gen. Clair Gill stated that the Army wants to focus on procurement rather than solely bearing development costs, encouraging manufacturers to contribute. ITEP has experienced previous delays and funding challenges, though lawmakers have intermittently provided support.

feed.title: Duke Energy America250 Grants Link Community Spending With Investor Story
feed.summary: Duke Energy Foundation launched its America250 grant initiative, dedicating over $250,000 to community projects and green space revitalization across several states, aligning with Earth Day activities and employee volunteering. This program, tied to the United States' 250th anniversary, reinforces Duke Energy's role as a community institution, which can positively influence its reputation, regulatory relationships, and local partnerships, even though it's not a direct earnings driver. For investors, these initiatives contribute to the company's "social license to operate" and could indirectly support its core utility model and investment plans.

feed.title: Vertex (NASDAQ: VRTX) director granted 107 deferred stock units as equity pay
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals director Bruce I. Sachs was granted 107.345 deferred stock units as routine equity compensation, valued at $442.50 per unit. These units represent common stock and will be paid out upon the earliest of his board service ending, a change of control, or his disability or death. Following this grant, Sachs now holds a total of 15,671.866 deferred stock units.

feed.title: Envista, Baxter, Surgery Partners, Charles River Laboratories, and Repligen Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several healthcare and biotech stocks, including Envista, Baxter, Surgery Partners, Charles River Laboratories, and Repligen, saw a jump in their stock prices. This increase is attributed to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, which signals a reduction in global logistics and energy costs, directly benefiting healthcare providers and medical device manufacturers by lowering operational expenses. Additionally, a "risk-on" sentiment driven by a ceasefire is redirecting capital into high-growth biotech and pharmaceutical sectors, supporting R&D and clinical trials.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) EVP granted 3,544 restricted share units as equity pay
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace's EVP, Jonathan A. Arena, was granted 3,544 restricted share units as equity compensation, as reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. These shares were awarded at no cash cost and are subject to future vesting conditions, with provisions for tax withholding upon vesting. This transaction is categorized as a routine compensation-related grant rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Opendoor (OPEN) COO executes 10,866-share tax sell-to-cover, keeps 8.19M shares
feed.summary: Opendoor Technologies Inc.'s Chief Operating Officer, Giang Nguyen, reported a sale of 10,866 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $4.6464 per share. This transaction was part of a mandatory "sell-to-cover" taxes program related to the vesting of restricted stock units and was not a discretionary trade. Following the sale, Nguyen still holds 8,189,134 shares of Opendoor, indicating a limited impact on her overall ownership.

feed.title: Merck & Co Inc Stock (MRK) Closed Up by 3.07% on Apr 17: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Merck & Co Inc (MRK) stock rose by 3.07% on April 17, driven by several positive developments. Key factors include the European Commission's approval of ENFLONSIA for infant RSV prevention, UBS analysts raising Merck's price target to "Buy," and the company exceeding earnings expectations with positive full-year guidance. Merck also has promising new drug candidates in its pipeline and strategic acquisitions to strengthen its oncology portfolio, despite facing future revenue decline risks from Keytruda's patent expiration.

feed.title: Bank of America Declares Preferred Stock Dividends Payable in May and June 2026 – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation has announced regular cash dividends on various series of its preferred stock. The dividends are scheduled to be paid in May and June 2026, with specific record and payment dates for each series, including Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series E, F, G, 1, 2, 4, and 5, as well as 6.000% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series GG, 5.375% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series KK, 5.000% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series LL, 4.250% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series QQ, and 4.750% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series SS. The announcement provides the dividend per share for each series and relevant contact information for investors and reporters.

feed.title: Bank of America Declares Preferred Stock Dividends Payable in May and June 2026
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) has announced regular cash dividends for 12 series of its preferred stock, with payment dates scheduled throughout May and June 2026. The announcement details specific dividend amounts per share or depositary share and corresponding record and payment dates for each series, including Series E, F, G, 1, 2, 4, 5, GG, KK, LL, QQ, and SS. Series F and G are noted as not being represented by depositary shares.

feed.title: KLA Corp Stock (KLAC) Closed Up by 3.19% on Apr 17: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: KLA Corp (KLAC) stock rose 3.19% on April 17, driven by strong Q4 2025 earnings, robust semiconductor market growth fueled by AI, and increased dividends and share buybacks. Despite these positives, intraday volatility was noted due to ongoing concerns about U.S. export controls on China-facing semiconductor equipment, which pose potential revenue headwinds and operational challenges. Analysts generally maintain positive ratings for KLAC, but risks such as potential market share decline and valuation concerns temper the outlook.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) EVP Jonathan Arena files initial insider Form 3
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. EVP, CL&CO, and Secretary, Jonathan A. Arena, has filed an initial insider ownership report on Form 3. This filing simply establishes his status as an officer and does not indicate any stock purchases, sales, or other transactions at this time. A Form 3 is required when an individual becomes an insider of a company, serving as an initial inventory of their beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Inc Stock (TXN) Closed Up by 3.02% on Apr 17: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Inc (TXN) stock closed up by 3.02% on April 17, driven by positive analyst upgrades, robust industry dynamics, and strategic company-specific developments. The semiconductor market is projected to exceed $1.3 trillion by 2026, fueled by AI demand, and TXN's initiatives like price increases, collaboration with Nvidia, and capacity expansion contribute to its positive outlook, ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report. Technical indicators also suggest a buy signal.

feed.title: TransDigm Group (NYSE: TDG) adds $1,500 million in debt for Stellant deal and buybacks
feed.summary: TransDigm Group (NYSE: TDG) has secured $1,500 million in new debt financing, comprising $500 million in 6.125% Senior Subordinated Notes due 2034 and $1,000 million in additional tranche N term loans maturing in 2033. These funds, along with cash on hand, will be used to finance the acquisition of Stellant Systems, Inc., cover approximately $800 million in common share repurchases completed in March 2026, and pay related transaction fees. The new debt features standard covenants and ranks junior to existing senior indebtedness, aligning with TransDigm’s current credit structure.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Stock (STX) Closed Up by 3.07% on Apr 17: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (STX) stock increased by 3.07% due to strong financial performance, exceeding Q2 2026 earnings and revenue expectations, and robust guidance for Q3. The company is benefiting from surging demand for high-capacity storage solutions driven by AI, with its HAMR technology and economically attractive HDDs gaining traction as SSD prices rise. Despite some insider selling and debt concerns, analyst upgrades and the focus on AI infrastructure contribute to a positive outlook for Seagate.

feed.title: The One Metric That Complicates eBay's Rally
feed.summary: This article discusses the privacy choices presented to users of Yahoo, an Oath brand, regarding the use of cookies and personal data. It outlines how Yahoo and its partners utilize cookies for website functionality, security, measurement, and, with consent, for analytics, personalized advertising, and content. Users are given options to accept all, reject all, or manage their privacy settings.

feed.title: INCYTE (NASDAQ: INCY) CEO granted 125,000 performance-based common shares
feed.summary: INCYTE's CEO, William Meury, has been granted 125,000 performance-based common shares, earned on April 15, 2026, upon achievement of specific performance criteria. These shares are scheduled to vest on July 2, 2026, contingent on his continued employment, with delivery set for June 26, 2028. Each performance share offers the potential to receive up to 400% of one common share, based on a six-year performance period.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) files Form 144 for planned sale
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has filed a Form 144 notice indicating a planned sale of 150,000 shares of common stock. The filing also details recent compensation issuances of shares on December 7 and 8, 2024, and past sales of 264,432 shares by Antonio F. Neri on March 25, 2026. J.P. Morgan Securities LLC is referenced in connection with the planned sale.

feed.title: Dell (DELL) COO Jeffrey Clarke sells 116,000 shares in pre-set 10b5-1 trade
feed.summary: Dell Technologies' COO & Vice Chairman, Jeffrey W. Clarke, sold 116,000 shares of Class C Common Stock for $182.48 per share in an open-market transaction on April 15, 2026. This sale was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on January 15, 2026. Following the transaction, Clarke still directly holds 1,687,414 shares and is also a co-managing trustee for two family trusts, each holding 100,000 shares.

feed.title: Incyte (NASDAQ: INCY) CMO earns 39,049 performance-based share award
feed.summary: Incyte's CMO & Head of Late-Stage Development, Steven H. Stein, was awarded 39,049 performance-based shares of common stock, which were acquired at no cost after performance criteria were met on April 15, 2026. These shares will vest on the third anniversary of the July 14, 2023 grant date, contingent on his continued employment. Following this award, Stein holds rights to 73,252 unvested shares, consisting of restricted stock units and earned performance shares, with performance goals tied to development, revenue, and relative total shareholder returns compared to the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index.

feed.title: Ventas (VTR) director gains stock units via dividend-equivalent grant
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. director Joe Vasquez Rodriguez Jr. received an equity award of 41.221 common stock shares, valued at $85.51 per share, on April 16, 2026. These units were granted under the company's Non-Employee Directors' Equity Award Deferral Program as dividend equivalents, payable solely in stock. Following this transaction, Rodriguez directly holds 7,847.719 shares of Ventas common stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] Ventas, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. director Marguerite M. Nader recently acquired 66.742 common stock units through an equity award tied to dividend equivalents, which were credited on April 16, 2026, under the company's Non-Employee Directors' Equity Award Deferral Program. These units, valued at $85.51 per share, increased her direct holdings to 21,424.958 common shares. The transaction was reported in a Form 4 filing, indicating an acquisition through a grant rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: Dividend equivalents boost Ventas (VTR) director Maurice Smith’s stock units
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. director Maurice S. Smith acquired 59.316 and 66.742 common stock units on April 16, 2026, as dividend equivalents under non-employee director deferral arrangements. These units, valued at $85.51 per share, are payable solely in common stock. Following these transactions, Smith directly holds a total of 28,675.671 shares of Ventas common stock.

feed.title: OEF Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:OEF
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the iShares S&P 100 Fund (OEF), an ETF designed to track the 100 largest and most stable blue-chip companies in the S&P 500. It covers key financial statistics such as assets under management, dividend yield, expense ratio, and price performance over various periods. The fund's structure, selection criteria, primary advisor, and tax considerations are also discussed, along with technical analysis and frequently asked questions about ETFs and OEF's specifics.

feed.title: Dividend-based stock units granted to Ventas (NYSE: VTR) director
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. director Michael J. Embler received 66.742 common stock units as compensation, tied to dividends paid on April 16, 2026. These units, valued at $85.51 per share, were granted under the company's Non-Employee Directors' Equity Award Deferral Program. Following this transaction, Embler directly holds 14,654.958 shares of Ventas common stock.

feed.title: Insider sale notice: Jabil Inc (NYSE: JBL) reports 14,000-share sale plan
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) has reported a Form 144 notice regarding proposed sales of common stock by insider Steven Borges. The filing outlines two transactions, each for 7,000 shares, scheduled for April 8, 2026, and April 9, 2026, totaling 14,000 shares. The company's shares outstanding are listed as 105,595,267 as of April 17, 2026.

feed.title: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) affiliate files Form 144 to sell 30,000 shares
feed.summary: An affiliate of Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) has filed a Form 144 indicating a proposed sale of 30,000 shares of common stock. The filing also details previous sales by the same holder, Mark Mondello, on February 2, 2026, March 2, 2026, and April 8, 2026. As of April 17, 2026, Jabil has 105,595,267 shares outstanding.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange : NYSE to Commence Delisting Proceedings Against QVC, Inc. (QVCC, QVCD)
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced it is commencing delisting proceedings against QVC, Inc. for its 6.250% Senior Secured Notes due 2068 (QVCC) and 6.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2067 (QVCD). This decision follows QVC Group, Inc. and its U.S. subsidiaries, including QVC, Inc., filing for voluntary Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings on April 16, 2026. Trading of QVC's securities was immediately suspended, with uncertainty noted regarding the effect of the bankruptcy on their value.

feed.title: North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE:NRT) - Earnings & Revenue Performance
feed.summary: North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE:NRT) shows an average annual earnings growth of 1.2%, significantly lower than the oil and gas industry average of 17.2%. Despite this, the company boasts a high return on equity of 516.3% and net margins of 91.9%. Recent updates indicate an acceleration in earnings growth over the last year (85.9%) exceeding both its 5-year average and the industry's performance.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. stock (US68902V1070): Is its service-driven model strong enough to unlock stead
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp. leads in the elevator and escalator market with a service-driven model that provides reliable revenue streams, largely unaffected by construction cycles. Its focus on high-margin maintenance contracts, global presence, and investments in new technology position it for stable growth amid accelerating urbanization. For investors, Otis offers a stable, dividend-paying stock with exposure to essential urban infrastructure and a strong competitive moat.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America stock (US6951561022): Is containerboard pricing power strong enough to unl
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America is a key player in the corrugated packaging sector, benefiting from steady e-commerce demand and its vertically integrated model. The company's focus on sustainable packaging and efficient mill operations positions it well in essential consumer and industrial markets. While facing risks from containerboard price cycles and input costs, analysts view PCA favorably for its resilient margins and disciplined operational approach.

feed.title: Board backs Boston Scientific acquisition of Penumbra (PEN); Special Meeting May 6, 2026
feed.summary: Penumbra's Board of Directors unanimously recommends shareholders vote FOR the proposed merger with Boston Scientific Corporation. A special meeting is scheduled for May 6, 2026, for shareholders to vote on the merger, and all necessary proxy materials have been distributed. Shareholders are urged to vote promptly, as failing to vote has the same effect as voting against the merger.

feed.title: [6-K] TDH Holdings, Inc. Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | PETZ SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: TDH Holdings, Inc. (PETZ) announced that Nasdaq has confirmed the company is back in compliance with exchange rules regarding independent board majority and audit committee composition. This resolution follows a prior notice of non-compliance and the subsequent appointment of Xu Luo to the board and audit committee. Nasdaq notified the company on April 15, 2026, that the matter is closed, securing its continued listing status.

feed.title: ORIC says a prostate cancer target appears early — and persists with resistance
feed.summary: ORIC Pharmaceuticals presented preclinical data at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting supporting the potential of rinzimetostat (ORIC-944), an allosteric EED/PRC2 inhibitor, for treating prostate cancer. The data indicate that PRC2 activity is an early and sustained therapeutic target in prostate cancer, including in metastatic and treatment-resistant settings. Rinzimetostat demonstrated antitumor activity in combination with darolutamide and efficacy in PRC2 methyltransferase-resistant models, suggesting it could be a best-in-class PRC2 inhibitor due to its improved drug-like properties and mechanism of action.

feed.title: Paramount sets July 1 payout for $0.05-a-share dividend
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share. The dividend is payable on July 1, 2026, to Class A and Class B shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026. This move provides a direct cash return to shareholders and outlines a clear payment timeline for investors.

feed.title: Datadog (DDOG) director sells 20K shares via 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Datadog director Amit Agarwal reported an insider transaction where a family trust converted 20,000 Class B Common Stock shares into Class A Common Stock, then sold these 20,000 Class A shares at $120.00 each through a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following these transactions, the trust's direct Class A holdings are reduced, though significant indirect Class B and direct Class A holdings remain through various family trusts and the spouse. The sale generated $2.40 million.

feed.title: Director-linked trust trims Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) stake under plan
feed.summary: A trust linked to Datadog director Shardul Shah, "The 2019 Shah Family Trust," sold 7,916 shares of Datadog Class A Common Stock at $120.00 per share on April 15, 2026. This transaction was pre-planned under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on June 13, 2025. Following the sale, the trust indirectly holds 316,953 shares, and Shardul Shah directly holds an additional 2,106 shares.
